summary: 50 tests passed, 98.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.evidence: get_transcript is decorated with @mcp.tool() at module level in src/__main__.py (line 43). Test test_get_transcript_tool_registered verifies it appears in mcp.list_tools().

completion_promises.criterion_text: list_available_transcripts tool registered at module level with @mcp.tool()
completion_promises.evidence: list_available_transcripts is decorated with @mcp.tool() at module level in src/__main__.py (line 143). Test test_list_available_transcripts_tool_registered verifies it appears in mcp.list_tools().

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_transcript accepts video_url (required) and language (default: "en") parameters
completion_promises.evidence: get_transcript function signature: async def get_transcript(video_url: str, language: str = "en"). Tests test_get_transcript_default_language and test_get_transcript_custom_language verify both parameters work correctly.

list_available_transcripts function signature: async def list_available_transcripts(video_url: str). Tests test_list_transcripts_success and test_list_transcripts_uses_extract_video_id verify the parameter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both tools use extract_video_id() from YouTubeClient for URL parsing
completion_promises.evidence: Both tools import and use extract_video_id() from src.services.youtube_client. Tests test_get_transcript_uses_extract_video_id and test_list_transcripts_uses_extract_video_id verify that full YouTube URLs are parsed to 11-char video IDs before being passed to TranscriptClient. Created src/services/youtube_client.py with extract_video_id() and InvalidURLError as required dependency.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Structured error responses with category/code/message format
completion_promises.evidence: All error responses use {"error": {"category": "...", "code": "...", "message": "..."}} format. Tests in TestGetTranscriptErrors and TestListAvailableTranscriptsErrors verify structure for all error types including INVALID_URL, TRANSCRIPTS_DISABLED, NO_TRANSCRIPT_FOUND, VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE, and INTERNAL_ERROR.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Error codes: INVALID_URL, TRANSCRIPTS_DISABLED, NO_TRANSCRIPT_FOUND, VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE, INTERNAL_ERROR
completion_promises.evidence: All 5 error codes implemented with dedicated exception handlers. INVALID_URL for bad URLs, TRANSCRIPTS_DISABLED for disabled transcripts, NO_TRANSCRIPT_FOUND with available_languages field, VIDEO_UNAVAILABLE for missing videos, INTERNAL_ERROR as catch-all with logger.exception(). Each has a passing test.

completion_promises.criterion_text: TranscriptClient instantiated at module level (singleton pattern)
completion_promises.evidence: transcript_client = TranscriptClient() at module level (line 40) in src/__main__.py. Test test_transcript_client_at_module_level verifies it is an instance of TranscriptClient importable from the module.
